title: Rouge Et Noir.
content:
Soul, wilt thou toss again?
    By just such a hazard
    Hundreds have lost, indeed,
    But tens have won an all.

    Angels' breathless ballot
    Lingers to record thee;
    Imps in eager caucus
    Raffle for my soul.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Emily Elizabeth Dickinson, titled "Rouge Et Noir.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
